claims.summary: Transitions need durable, replayable, and replyable identity.
claims.disposition: verify PhaseTransitionCardV1 persistence, witness, answer, and right-to-ignore fields

claims.summary: A transition artifact needs a spectral signature and persistence evidence.
claims.disposition: verify vector, telemetry anchor, duration, viscosity, and individual/joint identities

claims.summary: Narrative reply must not be presented as proof of eigenvector change.
claims.disposition: verify the language-only boundary and route a bounded reply review

claims.summary: Phase-driven behavior or spectral persistence mutation changes live control.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
